hero.tagline: Simpler shifts, less hassle, more peace

krakkavaktin.name: Krakkavaktin
krakkavaktin.description: An almost-ready solution for parents who want simpler communication and better oversight when kids want to meet and play.

thridjavaktin.name: Þriðja vaktin
thridjavaktin.description: A solution taking shape for tasks and responsibilities that pile up outside the visible schedule.

fyrstavaktin.name: First shift for kids
fyrstavaktin.description: Kids earn points for household chores and get their first taste of responsibility, reward, and a shift of their own.

others.list: Mótavaktin, Gæludýravaktin, Sjoppuvaktin, Foreldravaktin and Heimilisvaktin might be added later.

suggestion.success: Thanks! We'll keep that in mind.

krakkavaktin.title: Krakkavaktin
krakkavaktin.subtitle: Can Siggi come play?
krakkavaktin.description:
Parents use Messenger, for example, to ask if the kids can hang out. But Messenger is full of other unread messages, emotions and awkwardness that have no place in the context of whether your child is going out to play. Krakkavaktin is just messaging, where the child is always at the centre. Conversations disappear once play is over, making this a true peace of mind tool.

Should I message the mum or the dad, or both? Isn't the aunt with him on Tuesdays? You no longer need to think about this. You just message 'Siggi' and whoever is registered behind Siggi gets the message.
krakkavaktin.messengerQuote: Messenger works, but it's full of everything else you don't want to think about when you're just trying to arrange a playdate. Krakkavaktin is a small, calm place for that one conversation.

features.chat_desc: One question, one answer. No dashboards.
features.child_desc: The conversation is about Siggi, never the parents.
features.disappear_desc: When play is over, so is this.
features.calm_desc: No read receipts, no typing indicators.

krakkavaktin.waitlistDesc: We're putting the finishing touches on it. You'll get one email when it's ready, nothing else.

meta.title: Everything in Teskeið
meta.description: Many small everyday tools in one place. One account.

hero.description: Probably not quite, but soon! Home, kids, money, plans, gifts, memories and all the small things that were supposed to be simple often end up scattered everywhere. Teskeið brings small everyday tools into one place, one at a time.
hero.ideasIntro: The first step is finding out what you most want to put into your Teskeið.

submit.title: Submit an idea
submit.description: What problem do you want to see solved? Describe it as best you can, we review and add good ideas to the bank.

auth.betaLabel: Teskeið.is is in open beta testing and currently works best on a phone.

auth.slowEmailHint: The code may take a moment to arrive. Do not request a new code yet.

home.umonnunInfoPara1: Umönnun predates Teskeid.is and remains a standalone app for now.
home.umonnunInfoPara2: In hindsight, Umönnun is clearly a Teskeid topic: a solution to real care work that needs to be tracked together with others. The subject is sensitive and benefits from chat and other features that work best as an app.
home.umonnunInfoPara3: Umönnun will therefore remain its own app, at least until the Teskeid app launches.
home.recentDone: Everything is 10/10 for you in Teskeið.

vedrid.title: Weather
vedrid.placeholder: E.g.: Is it good grilling weather in Reykjavík tonight?
vedrid.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.
vedrid.errorUnsupportedIntent: This type of question is not supported yet. Try e.g.: "Is it good grilling weather in Reykjavík tonight?"
vedrid.errorUnknownPlace: I don't recognise that place. Try e.g. Mósó, Reykjavík or Grafarholt.
vedrid.errorForecastUnavailable: Weather forecast unavailable. Please try again.
vedrid.errorProviderNotConfigured: Route weather forecasting is in development — this feature is coming soon.
vedrid.errorUnknownRoute: Could not identify origin or destination in the question. Try e.g.: "Is it safe to drive with a caravan from Reykjavík to Akureyri?"
vedrid.errorRouteUnavailable: Could not calculate route weather. Please try again later.
vedrid.aiSource: This forecast was processed using AI.
vedrid.attribution: Based on data from MET Norway (met.no)
vedrid.betaBannerBody: We are still developing the travel weather assessment. Compare it with official forecasts and road conditions. If you know a road section where wind direction, gusts, crosswind or trailers change the risk, send us a Facebook message with a screenshot and explanation.
vedrid.exampleQuestion1: Is it good grilling weather in Reykjavík tonight?
vedrid.exampleQuestion2: Is it good grilling weather in Selfoss tomorrow?
vedrid.exampleQuestion3: Is it good grilling weather in Akureyri this afternoon?

ferdalagid.title: Travel Weather
ferdalagid.departureLabel: When are you planning to leave? (optional)
ferdalagid.latestArrivalLabel: Latest time to arrive at destination? (optional)
ferdalagid.resultLoadingSubtitle: Fetching the route, forecast points and weather data.
ferdalagid.resultLoadingStepWeather: Checking wind, precipitation and forecast points
ferdalagid.resultLoadingStepWindow: Looking for the best departure window
ferdalagid.betaTransparencyCopy: We show the forecast points along the route so you can verify the result.
ferdalagid.forecastHighlightedRowLabel: The forecast value used in calculation
ferdalagid.auditMapAlt: Route map from {origin} to {destination} with forecast points
ferdalagid.howAssessedShort: The travel assessment is calculated from the route, timing and forecast values along the route. AI does not make the decision. It may help phrase the result, but wind, precipitation, time and location drive the assessment. Check gusts and road conditions at the Road Administration separately.
ferdalagid.howAssessedTitle: All forecast points on the route
ferdalagid.routeMapUnavailable: The map could not load in this browser. You can still choose origin and destination and calculate the trip.
ferdalagid.auditMapUnavailable: The map did not load. The result is calculated from route and forecast data and is correct even without the map.
ferdalagid.nextCautionNone: No weather caution found in the assessed period.
ferdalagid.nextCautionInsufficient: Forecast data does not cover enough time ahead to assess future trips.
ferdalagid.forecastPointOnRoute: Forecast point is almost on the road.
ferdalagid.forecastPointDistanceMeters: Forecast point about {meters} m from the road.
ferdalagid.forecastPointDistanceKilometers: Forecast point about {kilometers} km from the road.
ferdalagid.errorProviderNotConfigured: Route weather forecasting is in development — this feature is coming soon.
ferdalagid.errorRouteUnavailable: Could not calculate the route. Please try again later.
ferdalagid.errorForecastUnavailable: Weather forecast unavailable. Please try again.
ferdalagid.errorTimesInvalid: The times are not logical. Check departure and return.

ferdalagid.weatherDisclaimer: This assessment is based on data from the same weather service that Yr uses. For driving, also check gusts and road conditions, e.g. at the <link>Road Administration</link>, especially if you're towing a trailer, folding camper, or motorhome.
